headline: Valve describes just how brutal RAM negotiations are in 2026
summary: Valve's Steam Machine is launching at high prices: $1,049 for 512GB, $1,349 for 2TB. These costs are exacerbated by a lack of hardware subsidies and ongoing component crises. The prices do not even include bundled controllers, further driving up the total.

headline: AI is cursing renters with the promise of impossible homes
summary: Renters are facing "hell" due to AI-generated virtual staging creating misleading apartment listings. Joyce's dream Manhattan studio turned out to be a fabrication, highlighting the problem. AI promises spacious, affordable homes that often don't exist in reality.

headline: The Apple Watch SE 3 is just $199 for Prime Day
summary: The Apple Watch SE 3 is available for an all-time low price of $199 during Prime Day. It's considered a great value, offering significant upgrades over its predecessors. Key features include an always-on display and new gesture controls.

headline: The Steam Machine is the start of an even more expensive future for game consoles
summary: Video game hardware, including consoles and PC components, is facing increasing prices. The Steam Machine's high cost signals a trend towards a more expensive future for gaming. A global RAM shortage is largely responsible for these rising industry costs.

headline: Save $2,500 Off an Alienware Area-51 Gaming PC
summary: You can save $2,500 on an Alienware Area-51 Gaming PC with top-tier specifications. The PC includes a GeForce RTX 5090 GPU, 64GB of RAM, and a 4TB SSD. Despite the large discount, the system is still noted as being quite expensive.

headline: Amazon's June Audible Deal Improved for Prime Day
summary: Amazon's June Audible deal now offers membership for just $1 per month. Subscribers also receive a valuable $20 Audible credit. This enhanced offer comes ahead of Prime Day, perfect for audiobook enthusiasts.

headline: Today's Best Deals: AirPods Max 2, Silent Hill f, and Early Prime Day Sales
summary: Today's top deals feature AirPods Max 2, the game Silent Hill f, and a LEGO Flower Bouquet. Other early Prime Day offers include savings on PS Pulse Explore Earbuds. Deals are also available on the Switch 2 console and Nintendo eGift Cards.

headline: Apple Watch Series 11 Hits Lowest Price for Prime Day
summary: The Apple Watch Series 11 has dropped to its lowest price ever for Amazon Prime Day. It is considered the best Apple Watch model for most iPhone users. This deal presents a prime opportunity for those looking to upgrade or purchase a new Apple Watch.

headline: Starmer Quits as Labour Leader, PM Contest Looms
summary: Sir Keir Starmer has announced his resignation as the leader of the Labour Party. His departure paves the way for a contest to elect a new prime minister. Starmer delivered a statement outlining his planned exit from Downing Street.

headline: Chris Mason: Questions Mount for Starmer's Successor
summary: Chris Mason highlights the increasing questions surrounding Andy Burnham, tipped to replace Starmer. The BBC's political editor states Burnham must clearly articulate how he will deliver on promises. Burnham faces scrutiny as he prepares to set out his political stall.

headline: What Does Trump Want from a New UK Prime Minister?
summary: Questions are being raised about US President Trump's expectations for the new UK Prime Minister. His previously close friendship with Keir Starmer deteriorated significantly. The relationship reportedly fell apart following the war in Iran.

headline: Watch: A Day of Change and Mixed Emotions for Labour
summary: The Labour Party experienced a day of significant changes and mixed emotions. Andy Burnham was sworn in as MP for Makerfield. This event occurred just hours after Keir Starmer announced his resignation as Labour Party leader.
